title: Replace principal-based admin access with password authentication (WRAITH123)

requirements.summary: Replace Internet Identity login requirement on Admin Panel with password entry screen using 'WRAITH123' passphrase
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin shows a password prompt screen instead of redirecting to Internet Identity login.
Entering 'WRAITH123' and submitting calls the backend `verifyAdminPassword` function and, on success, renders the AdminPanelContent.
Entering an incorrect password displays a styled 'ACCESS DENIED — INVALID PASSPHRASE' message without revealing the correct password.
The password prompt UI matches the WRAITH dark classified-ops theme (near-black background, amber/red accents, monospaced typography).
Successful password entry persists the authenticated state for the session so the user is not prompted again on re-render.

file_operations.description: Replace the current authentication check (Internet Identity + isCallerAdmin) with a password-based authentication flow. Display a full-screen password prompt form styled with WRAITH dark theme (near-black background, amber/red accents, monospace font). On form submission, call the backend `verifyAdminPassword` function. On success, store the authenticated state in React state or sessionStorage and render AdminPanelContent. On failure, display 'ACCESS DENIED — INVALID PASSPHRASE' error message. Remove all Internet Identity login dependencies and admin role checks from this page.
